title: Stickman API
description: A very,very flexible mod with placeholder items for Datapack creators. This mod is required for every project by Lexter.
body:
## Stickman API 🛠️
Requires [FABRIC API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)!

Move the .jar file (The Mod) into the ```mods``` folder. (Hold Win + R, then type %appdata% and click on .minecraft now search for the ```mods``` folder. Drag SICKMAN API in this Folder and you are done!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Using Stickman API with Datapacks ⚙️
Are you a datapack creator looking for placeholder items? Stickman API is the perfect mod for you! This mod adds over 20 placeholder items that can be identified within a datapack. It also includes items for ALL Lexter datapacks, allowing me to create even better datapacks. Thinks the mod adds:

- 20 Placeholder Item for 3rd. Datapack creators
- Placeholder Items for Lexter's Datapacks
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


### Updates ✉️

Stickman API will always be updated to the latest Minecraft version as quickly as possible!
